vBRIEFInfo.description: Fix #952 (triage:bootstrap hangs after cache:fetch-all at backlog scale, post-#883 v1) and #951 (--skip-gitcrawl flag scrub from triage:bootstrap task description). Single PR closing both. Adds per-step structured progress output and a hermetic regression test simulating a 50+ issue backlog.

plan.title: fix(triage): bootstrap orchestrator hang post-cache:fetch-all (#952) + scrub --skip-gitcrawl (#951)

narratives.Problem: v0.26.0 Story 3 shipped scripts/triage_bootstrap.py orchestrating cache:fetch-all + audit-log backfill + dual gitignore-ensure for github-issue. The 2026-05-06 scale smoke (#883, doc docs/smoke-2026-05-06-v0.26.0-scale.md, PR #953) showed: Phase 1 (limit=50) ran clean in 58.5s; Phase 2 against the full deftai/directive backlog hung after cache:fetch-all completed -- last cache audit at 2026-05-06T18:00:09Z (issue #9 cache:put), 71+ minutes of orchestrator silence before maintainer cancelled. Two follow-up defects filed: #952 (HIGH, blocks bulk-ingest) and #951 (cosmetic; tasks/triage-bootstrap.yml description still cites a --skip-gitcrawl flag the Story 3 rewrite no longer accepts).
narratives.Overview: Investigate the post-fetch hang by reading scripts/triage_bootstrap.py end-to-end, identifying which post-cache step (backfill_audit_log, ensure_gitignore_entry, ensure_gitignore_eval_dir) blocks at backlog scale, and applying the appropriate fix (timeout/retry on a stuck subprocess or lock, batch/parallelise an O(N) loop, or stream an oversized read). Add structured per-step progress output (stderr status lines with item counts) so future hangs are observable. Scrub --skip-gitcrawl from tasks/triage-bootstrap.yml task description and any docstring/help text in scripts/triage_bootstrap.py; verify argparse never accepted the flag.
narratives.Constraint: DO NOT modify scripts/cache.py, scripts/cache_scanner.py, scripts/scm.py, tasks/cache.yml, tasks/scm.yml, vbrief/schemas/cache-meta.schema.json, UPGRADING.md, skills/. DO NOT run task triage:bootstrap against deftai/directive (it hangs -- that's the bug). PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule: edits touching non-ASCII glyphs go through Python pathlib + utf-8. Single PR; draft (no merge, no ready). Closes #952 and Closes #951 in PR body for squash auto-close. CHANGELOG bullet under [Unreleased] only; do NOT promote to v0.26.1.
narratives.Outcome: task triage:bootstrap completes deterministically against a 50+ issue hermetic backlog within a small wall-clock cap (~30s); per-step progress is observable on stderr; --skip-gitcrawl no longer appears in task description / docstrings; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] gains a Fixed bullet; task check is green; draft PR is open with both Closes #952 and Closes #951; greptile lane resolved per the review-cycle skill.
narratives.Test: tests/integration/test_triage_bootstrap_at_scale.py (NEW, hermetic) -- simulates a 50+ issue backlog via a fake-gh shim, drives scripts/triage_bootstrap.run_bootstrap(), asserts (a) exit_code == 0; (b) wall-clock <= 30s; (c) all four steps emit ok=True StepOutcomes; (d) per-step progress lines were emitted (stderr capture). Existing tests/test_triage_bootstrap.py kept green. task check (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch) MUST pass.
narratives.Action: Create scope vBRIEF (this file). scope:promote + vbrief:activate + vbrief:preflight. Investigate the hang root cause via reproduction at small scale. Apply fix + add structured progress output. Scrub --skip-gitcrawl. Add hermetic regression test. CHANGELOG bullet. task check green. Push branch fix/952-triage-bootstrap-hang. Open DRAFT PR closing #952 + #951. Run review-cycle (cap 3 iterations). scope:complete on the way out.

items.title: Reproduce the post-cache:fetch-all hang at small scale via fake-gh shim or small fixture; identify the exact blocking call (subprocess buffer / lock / O(N) loop)
Apply the appropriate fix to scripts/triage_bootstrap.py (timeout + drain on subprocess, batch / parallelise on O(N), or other) -- documented in commit + PR body
Add structured per-step progress output (stderr status lines with item counts) matching the style of scripts/cache.py / cache_scanner.py so future hangs are observable
Scrub --skip-gitcrawl from tasks/triage-bootstrap.yml task description and any docstring/help text in scripts/triage_bootstrap.py; argparse never accepted it (verify)
Add tests/integration/test_triage_bootstrap_at_scale.py: hermetic 50+ issue backlog via fake-gh shim; asserts exit 0, wall-clock <= 30s, four ok StepOutcomes, progress emitted
task check passes (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch)
Push branch fix/952-triage-bootstrap-hang and open DRAFT PR (no merge, no ready) with Closes #952 and Closes #951 in body for squash auto-close
Run skills/deft-directive-review-cycle (cap 3 iterations); greptile-errored -> retry once via @greptileai then halt

references.title: Issue #952 (HIGH): triage:bootstrap orchestrator hangs after cache:fetch-all completes at backlog scale (post-#883 v1; blocks bulk-ingest)
Issue #951: triage:bootstrap task description references obsolete --skip-gitcrawl flag (post-#883 v1)
Issue #883: deft-cache unified content cache + quarantine layer (parent epic; v0.26.0 shipped Story 3 that introduced this regression)
Story 3 vBRIEF (the rewrite that introduced scripts/triage_bootstrap.py in its current shape)
v0.26.0 cache-layer scale smoke -- Phase 1 clean / Phase 2 hang evidence
